config_yaml:
symbol: XAU/USD
timezone: Asia/Jakarta
websocket:
  url: wss://ws.twelvedata.com/v1/quotes/price
  reconnect_delay_seconds: 5
  max_reconnect_delay_seconds: 60
  heartbeat_seconds: 20
storage:
  sqlite_path: data/xauusd_bot.sqlite
  save_raw_ticks: true
  raw_tick_retention_days: 30
  candle_retention_days: 730
timeframes:
- M1
- M5
- M15
- H1
- H4
- D1
warmup:
  early_mode:
    m5_min_candles: 24
    m15_min_candles: 8
  full_mode:
    m5_min_candles: 50
    m15_min_candles: 32
    h1_min_candles: 12
trading:
  instrument: XAUUSD
  mode: medium
  min_confidence: 65
  preferred_min_confidence: 70
  high_confidence: 80
  max_signals_per_day: 6
  cooldown_minutes_same_direction: 45
  cooldown_minutes_any_signal: 20
risk:
  min_sl_points: 4.0
  ideal_sl_min_points: 5.0
  ideal_sl_max_points: 8.0
  max_sl_points: 10.0
  tp1_min_points: 4.0
  tp1_ideal_points: 5.0
  tp2_min_points: 8.0
  tp2_ideal_points: 12.0
  min_rr_to_tp1: 1.0
  min_rr_to_tp2: 2.0
session:
  priority_sessions:
    london:
      start: '14:00'
      end: '17:00'
    new_york:
      start: '19:00'
      end: '23:30'
  avoid_sessions:
    rollover:
      start: 04:45
      end: 06:15
ai:
  enabled: true
  provider: deepseek
  max_tokens: 500
  temperature: 0.2
rest_bootstrap:
  enabled: true
  run_on_startup: true
  max_requests_per_startup: 4
  use_closed_candles_only: true
  m5_outputsize: 200
  m15_outputsize: 200
  h1_outputsize: 100
  h4_outputsize: 50
  d1_outputsize: 80
poi:
  enabled: true
  timeframes:
  - H4
  - H1
  - M15
  - M5
alerts:
  telegram_sweep: false
  telegram_break: false
  telegram_entry: true
  telegram_tp_sl: true
ai_smart_token:
  enabled: true
  allow_ai_for_sweep_break_important: true
  allow_ai_for_poi_report: true
  allow_ai_for_premium_signal: true
  block_ai_for_no_trade_auto: true
  block_ai_for_duplicate_event: true
adaptive_rules:
  enabled: true
  require_yes_no: true
  trial_mode: true
  trial_target_signals: 50
  allow_auto_permanent_change: false
tp_protection:
  move_to_be_after_tp1: true
  loss_after_tp1_counts_as_partial_win: true
poi_summary:
  enabled: true
  telegram_interval_minutes: 60
  use_ai: false
  use_rest: false
ai_hourly_review:
  enabled: false
  interval_minutes: 60
  max_tokens: 700
  use_rest: false
  send_to_telegram: true
adaptive_brain:
  enabled: true
  high_wr_only: false
  main_methods: []
  method_governance:
    enabled: true
    mode: report_only
    rr_policy: TP2_ONLY_RR_1_TO_2
    auto_edit_methods: false
    require_owner_approval: true
    locked_methods:
    - METHOD_M5_BREAK_6
    - METHOD_M5_BREAK_12
    - METHOD_HW_BREAK_12_SELL
    - METHOD_M1_SWEEP_12
    - METHOD_M1_BREAK_6
    - METHOD_M1_BREAK_8
    - METHOD_M5_BREAK_8
    - METHOD_PATTERN_SHOOTING_STAR
    - RR2_GROUP_SELL
    - METHOD_ICT_TURTLE_SOUP_SELL
    - METHOD_HW_BREAK_12_BUY
    - METHOD_ICT_TURTLE_SOUP_BUY
    - METHOD_CRT_H4_SWEEP_BUY
    - METHOD_CRT_H4_SWEEP_SELL
    - METHOD_HW_BREAK_20_BUY
    - METHOD_HW_BREAK_20_SELL
    - METHOD_M1_SWEEP_6
    - METHOD_M5_SWEEP_12
    - METHOD_M5_SWEEP_8
    - METHOD_CRT_D1_SWEEP_SELL
    - METHOD_HW_SWEEP_12_SELL
    - METHOD_HW_SWEEP_32_SELL
    watch_methods: []
    notes: Metode utama dikunci. AI/Antigravity hanya boleh evaluasi, membuat laporan,
      dan memberi rekomendasi. Tidak boleh auto-edit rule.
  high_wr_safe_hours_utc: []
  dual_signal_mode: true
  v6_lookbacks:
  - 6
  - 8
  - 12
  v6_timeframe_filters:
    M1:
      atr_min: 0.2
      atr_max: 6.0
